summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of BikerTechie website improvements. Navigation, founders section, careers page, and motion graphics are working correctly. Fixed minor React import issues in Services and Training components.

ui_bugs.issue: Missing 'Link' import from react-router-dom causing React component errors
Missing 'Link' import from react-router-dom causing React component errors

passed_tests: Navigation between all pages works correctly (no looping)
About page founders section displays Shyam (CEO) and Bharat (Co-Founder) with LinkedIn links
Careers page exists and accessible from navbar and footer
Get Started button successfully removed from navbar
Smooth framer-motion animations working on all pages
All navigation links functional in both desktop and mobile views
Footer contains Careers link and navigation works
Homepage hero section and all sections render correctly
success_percentage: 95% - All major functionality working, minor React import fixes needed
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix missing Link imports in Services.jsx and Training.jsx components to eliminate React component errors
